teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective finish_hand.

partnerBelief.summary: My partner (player 2) has 3 hidden cards. Given the hand counts, my partner likely wants me to exit quickly and may hold a high card or trump to cover a future low lead, but I cannot assume this as fact.

opponentBelief.summary: Each opponent holds 3 hidden cards and will try to seize the lead to stop me from going out. They are very likely to be able to beat a low 2 lead with an ordinary higher card or a trump 7/joker.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Selected play-single-spade-A-copy2 after deterministic schema repair of ToM reasoning.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Legal alternative retained for verifier comparison after schema repair.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.

notes: Deterministically schema-repaired from a ToM-prompted raw output; selectedActionId is unchanged.
